query: ok im back from lunch -- what did you and the agents get done while i was out?
catch me up on where this project's at, been a few days since i looked
i've been heads-down in another repo all week, give me the rundown on what changed in circuit
where are we now? kinda lost track after the auth refactor landed
fill me in on the state of things since we kicked off the data-layer cleanup this morning
i haven't been following this one closely. summarize what's happened so far so i can decide what to point you at next
quick recap of what's changed since yesterday? skip the code, i just want the gist so i can steer
what's the headline on what landed here recently -- i've got like 4 projects going and can't keep up with each
been afk a while. whats the high level on what the agents did, and is there anything that needs a decision from me
what changed in src/runtime/engine.ts? show me the actual diff for that file
catch me up on the latest react 19 features, specifically the new use() hook
where are we storing the auth tokens right now? trying to find the config file
give me a rundown of which tests are currently failing so i can start fixing them one by one
can you summarize what this reducer function does, line by line
what's the status of the vercel deploy, did it actually go through or is it still building
recap the key points from the meeting notes i just pasted above
fill in the missing fields on this TypeScript interface for me
brief me on how oauth token refresh works in general, i never fully got the flow
the build broke right after the last commit -- dig into what that commit changed and figure out why
update the changelog file with everything that's changed since v2.1
